summary: This video is an instructional/testimonial interview with Dr. Amira Zohiwer, a consultant obstetrician & gynecologist from UAE Dubai, providing her personal account and feedback about an ALEXEA laparoscopy training course. The video contains no FLS task performance, no surgical instrument work, and no timed procedural demonstration. It is purely interview-based with narration about course expectations, learning experience, team organization, and course recommendation.
scoring_status: NOT SCORED — video does not contain FLS task performance
reason: This is an instructional/testimonial video. Per classification rules, instructional content with narration and lecture content is not scored. No surgical task execution is visible. The video shows only a person speaking to camera in an office/interview setting with no instruments, trainers, or procedural work.

themes_discussed: Initial uncertainty about course content and expectations
Significant value gained exceeding initial expectations
